body.body: metadata LIKE trigger scan fires twice per turn at 55ms each — full table scan because SQLite cannot index JSON. Lighter fix: cache PROCEDURAL habit rows in-process at boot (habits rarely change mid-session). Heavier fix: add trigger_text column + index. Discuss schema change with Designer before implementing. See #260.
body.title: Cache habit list in-process to avoid metadata LIKE scan (#260)
body.result: cortex.py: added _habit_cache (Optional[list]) to __init__; get_habits() returns cached list on hit, populates on miss; invalidate_habit_cache() clears it; store() auto-invalidates when stored memory is a habit (is_habit=True). Eliminates repeated 55ms LIKE full-table scans per turn — cache persists for session lifetime, invalidated only on new habit creation. Syntax OK.
